tasks.label: qemu-debug
tasks.command: set -e; cd "${workspaceFolder}"; . ./src/config.sh; export CFLAGS='-O0 -g3'; . ./iso.sh; rm -f .vscode/qemu-gdb.pid; qemu-system-$(./src/target-triplet-to-arch.sh "$HOST") -cdrom makar.iso -serial stdio -s -S & qemu_pid=$!; echo "$qemu_pid" > .vscode/qemu-gdb.pid; echo 'QEMU GDB stub ready on :1234'; wait "$qemu_pid"

tasks.label: qemu-debug-stop
tasks.command: set -e; cd "${workspaceFolder}"; if [ -f .vscode/qemu-gdb.pid ]; then pid=$(cat .vscode/qemu-gdb.pid); if kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then kill "$pid"; fi; rm -f .vscode/qemu-gdb.pid; fi
